name: USB-C 4-in-2 Hub, Featuring USB 3.0 and 3 USB 2.0 Ports, Adapter Compatible with USB-C Laptops and Serves as a Dongle for USB Connectivity on MacBook Pro/Air,iPad Pro,iMac,iPhone 15 Pro,Xbox,PS5,XPS
